answers: Nootropics are substances claimed to enhance cognitive function, memory, creativity, or motivation. They range from natural options like caffeine and omega-3s to synthetic compounds like racetams and modafinil.

Natural nootropics include caffeine, L-theanine (found in green tea), omega-3 fatty acids, bacopa monnieri, and lion's mane mushroom. These are generally safer than synthetic options and have some research backing.
Nootropics holo brain-boosting supplement ba substance jegulo memory, focus, ar cognitive function improve kore. Caffeine, green tea, omega-3, ar lion's mane mushroom holo natural nootropics.

While some nootropics show promise in research, many marketed brain supplements lack strong evidence. The safest cognitive enhancers remain good sleep, regular exercise, proper nutrition, and staying mentally active. Always consult a doctor before taking any supplement.
